Welcome.slide1Description: Explore a curated selection of authentic luxury fashion.
Welcome.slide2Description: Your trusted marketplace for pre-loved treasures.
Welcome.slide3Description: Connect with fashion lovers across Albania and Europe.

Auth.signInDescription: Welcome back! Enter your details to sign in.
Auth.signUpDescription: Join our community of fashion lovers.
Auth.forgotPasswordDescription: Enter your email to receive a password reset link.
Auth.authGateTitle: Register today for a special discount off your first purchase.
Auth.verifyEmailDescription: We've sent a verification link to your email address. Please check your inbox and follow the link to complete your registration.
Auth.checkYourEmailDescription: If an account with that email exists, we've sent it a link to reset the password.

Common.termsAndConditions: You agree to our <1>Terms of Service</1> and <3>Privacy Policy</3>.

Home.firstTimeDescription: Shop: 15% off with code <1>WELCOME15</1>. Sell: No fees to start.*...

ShoppingPreference.title: Select shopping preference
ShoppingPreference.description: Personalize your homepage to get started.

Sell.title: Sell an item
Sell.description: Give your wardrobe a second life. List in minutes. Ship for free. Start earning effortlessly.
Sell.itemTypeQuestion: What type of item are you selling?
Sell.vintageDescription: Select if this item is over 15 years old.
Sell.proofDescription: This information will not be publicly displayed.
Sell.addProof: Add receipt, authenticity card, or invoice
Sell.photosSubDescription: Take photos from multiple angles to show all the details (including any flaws).
Sell.photosInfoDescription: For your main photo, lay the item flat by itself on a plain, contrasting color so we can easily remove the background.
Sell.descriptionPageDescription: Add details about your item to attract buyers.
Sell.itemTitlePlaceholder: e.g. Chanel Classic Medium Double Flap Bag
Sell.itemDescriptionPlaceholder: Describe the item's features, history, and any imperfections.
Sell.originInfo: We can't accept items gifted at VIP or press events, sent complimentary, or offered in-store as part of a purchase. Items from private and staff sales may also be ineligible.
Sell.serialNumberDescription: This information will not be publicly displayed.
Sell.addressDescription: Select the address you will be shipping from.
Sell.earningTooltip: This is your estimated earning after a 20% commission and a €5 service fee are deducted.
Sell.shippingInfo: The buyer will also pay for shipping. <1>Learn more</1>
Sell.reviewInfo: Double check everything: after listing, you can only add photos and lower the price.
Sell.buyerFeeTooltip: The buyer will pay an additional service fee on top of your listing price.
Sell.termsConfirmation: By clicking on "Submit my item", I confirm that the information provided complies with the <1>general terms of use</1>.
Sell.successDescription: We'll review your listing, edit the main photo, and email you an update soon.
Sell.sustainabilityDescription: 82% of items sold with us replace a new purchase.
